title: SweetWater 420 Fest - Day 2
description: Atlanta's beloved annual music festival returns for its 21st year! Day 2 features headliners Umphrey's McGee, Thievery Corporation, and Chromeo. Great for couples who love live music, craft beer, and a festival atmosphere. Multiple stages with diverse acts including Cimafunk. Perfect for a full day date - grab food, drinks, and dance together.

title: Can't Even Comedy Show
description: Stand-up comedy show at one of Atlanta's trendy boutique hotels. Perfect for a date night - grab dinner at the hotel restaurant before or after the show. Intimate setting ideal for couples who love to laugh together. Beer, wine, and cocktails available.

title: Helium Comedy Club - John Caparulo
description: Atlanta's premier comedy club hosting veteran stand-up John Caparulo. Two showtimes available - catch the early or late show. Full bar service, appetizer menu. Great low-key date idea - close seating encourages conversation, and laughing together is proven to increase attraction!

title: Dueling Pianos at Park Bench
description: Rockin' dueling pianos show - audience requests, sing-alongs, and high energy! Located at The Battery Atlanta, so you can make a full evening of it with dinner at any of the nearby restaurants. Fun, interactive date - no cover charge makes it budget-friendly. Prepare to be dragged up on stage if you're lucky!

title: Love is Love Plant Sale at Peachtree Road Farmers Market
description: Love is Love Cooperative Farm brings certified organic spring plants. Support local agriculture while picking out something green for your home together. The market also has prepared foods, baked goods, coffee - perfect for a Saturday morning date. Great photo ops among the plants and flowers!

title: Atlanta VegWeek - Week-Long
description: Citywide celebration of plant-powered eating! Multiple Atlanta restaurants offer special vegan/vegetarian menus throughout the week. Great opportunity to try new spots together - browse participating restaurants and make a reservation. More than 30 restaurants involved. Search 'Atlanta VegWeek 2026' for the full list.

title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends - Atlanta
location: BLOCK & DRUM, 5105 Peachtree Blvd Building B, Chamblee, GA
description: The #UnapologeticallyAfrican experience returns! Amapiano, Afrobeats, and more with DJ AYA and friends. 7-hour party in a cool Chamblee venue. 21+ event with a strong community vibe. Great for couples who love dancing, African music culture, and energetic nightlife. Parking $20 at venue or free at nearby Walmart/Keswick Park.

title: Roaring 20s Latin Night - Salsa & Bachata
description: Dancing For Fun LLC hosts this retro-styled Latin night featuring Salsa and Bachata. Dress in your 1920s best for extra fun! Two rooms - one Salsa, one Bachata. Beginners welcome - great opportunity for couples to learn a new dance style together. Alpharetta location means parking is usually easy.

title: Bachata Class + Latin Night at Tortugas Cuban Grill
time: Doors open 7 PM, class 7:30 PM, dancing after
description: 2-hour Bachata class followed by Latin night dancing. Start with the lesson (no partner needed - they'll rotate you in!), then stay for the party. Tortugas Cuban Grill is a beloved Atlanta institution with great Cuban food and mojitos. Budget-friendly date idea that includes dinner and dancing in one.

title: Improvability Theory's April Showers You With Laughter
description: Local improv comedy group performs original interactive shows. Perfect for couples who enjoy spontaneous humor and don't mind the unexpected. More intimate than big comedy clubs - great if you like improvisational theater and supporting local arts.

title: Celestial Perspectives Exhibition
location: Marietta Cobb Museum of Art, 30 Atlanta Street SE, Marietta
description: Jess Self's installation-based solo exhibition of hand-woven textile art reimagines the museum as a multi-dimensional portal. The Art Institute describes it as 'a cosmic map and textile labyrinth.' Make a trip of it - see the exhibit, then grab dinner in historic Marietta Square. Great rainy day or evening date option.

title: ULTRARUIN Photography Exhibition
description: Contemporary photography exhibition exploring themes of decay, urban exploration, and the beauty in destruction. Atlanta Photography Group venue. Great for couples interested in visual arts, urban photography, or architecture. Short show - runs only through early May, so catch it soon.
